stories.title: Utah Talons Lead the AUSL — Montana Fouts Sets League Strikeout Record With 12 Ks
stories.angle: The Talons are building a quiet, legitimate title case — with the league's most dominant recent pitching performance to back it up. Fouts' K record is the week's signature stat.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Montana Fouts just set the AUSL single-game strikeout record.

12 Ks. Seven innings. A 4-3 complete-game win over the Texas Volts.

The Utah Talons are 13-5 and in first place — and tonight they play the Spark at 8 PM ET.

The title race is heating up. #AUSL #Softball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
AUSL standings check — July 9:

1. Utah Talons — 13-5
2. Chicago Bandits — 10-7 (6-game win streak)
T-3. Carolina Blaze / Portland Cascade — 8-7

Talons vs. Spark tonight at 8 PM ET at Tom Heath Field.

11 days left. The race is real. #AUSL #Softball

article.headline: Montana Fouts Sets AUSL Strikeout Record as Utah Talons Lead the League

stories.title: MLBx All-Star 3-On-3 — 3 Days Away: Breaking Down the Format
stories.angle: With three days to go, give fans the full breakdown of how this event works — rules, scoring, stakes. Most casual fans don't know the format yet.

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
MLBx: All-Star 3-on-3 is 3 days away. Here's the format:

3 innings. 2-minute at-bat per inning per player.
Home runs + catches = 1 point each.
Hot streak bonus: 5 swings, all points doubled.

Sunday. Citizens Bank Park. Softball takes over.

#AUSL #Softball #AllStarWeek

article.headline: Three Days Until MLBx: What the All-Star 3-On-3 Is and Why Softball Fans Should Watch

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:

Citizens Bank Park field silhouette in background. Four AUSL player name callouts: Brito / Jennings / Garcia / Canady. Date: "JULY 12."

stories.title: Patty Gasso and Lonni Alameda Join the AUSL Broadcast Booth This Week
stories.angle: Two of the biggest names in coaching history become the voices of AUSL games. A legitimacy moment for professional softball.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Patty Gasso and Lonni Alameda are joining the AUSL broadcast booth this week.

Eight national titles. Two decades of building champions.

Now they're calling the games.

The best coaches in softball history — calling the best players in professional softball. 🥎

#AUSL #Softball

article.headline: Patty Gasso and Lonni Alameda Join the AUSL Broadcast Booth — Why It Matters

stories.title: Megan Grant ESPYS — 6 Days to Vote
stories.angle: Updated 6-day countdown — tighter window, stronger urgency.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
6 days left to vote for Megan Grant at the ESPYs.

She broke a 31-year NCAA record with 42 home runs. She's up against the NFL, the Olympics, and a marathon runner.

One vote per day at ESPN.com.

Softball, show up. #Softball #ESPYs

article.headline: Six Days Left: The Softball Community Must Vote for Megan Grant at the ESPYs

stories.title: PGF Nationals 10 Days — Roster Freeze in 4 Days
stories.angle: 4-day freeze deadline is the urgency hook for coaches and families.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Coaches: 4 days until the PGF Nationals roster freeze.

July 13 is the deadline. July 19 is the first pitch at Great Park, Irvine.

After Thursday, your roster is locked.

Is your lineup set? #PGFNationals #Softball #18USoftball
